title: Test: Add comprehensive unit tests
original_text: Added comprehensive unit tests for core modules. Implemented test coverage for all public APIs. Added unit tests for edge cases and error conditions. Implemented test fixtures and mocks. Added unit tests for data validation. Result: unit test coverage 85%.
expected_body_lines: - Implement test coverage for all public APIs
- Add unit tests for edge cases and error conditions
- Add unit tests for data validation
expected_command: git commit -m "test(unit): add comprehensive unit tests"
